Entity Profile
P

Gudrun Vestergaard

Person · First seen 3309-01-16 · 7 mentions
Active: 3309-01-16 → 3309-10-02
Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3309-10-02
The Future of the Throne
Senator Lysandra Courcelle raises concerns about Emperor Arissa's lack of heirs, sparking debate about Imperial succession.
3309-08-25
Deliveries Requested to Commemorate Duval Family
Archduke Otto Lombardo-Duval requests materials to construct Duval family statues across Imperial worlds, with mixed reactions from the palace.
3309-08-18
Duvals Rally Around Imperial Mother
Lady Florence Lavigny's recovery prompts calls for Imperial Family unity, with speculation that she could heal rifts between Arissa, Aisling, and Hadrian Duval.
3309-07-03
Imperial Mother in Medical Emergency
Lady Florence Lavigny suffers a sudden illness, prompting Emperor Arissa to cancel all appointments; family members including Hadrian send well-wishes in an apparent reconciliation gesture.
3309-05-30
Hadrian Duval Remarks on ‘Weak Emperor’
Hadrian Duval criticizes Emperor Arissa as 'weak' for contributing to Aegis, questioning whether her year in captivity drained her resolve; Aisling's role in Aegis is also discussed.
3309-02-17
Princess Aisling ‘Understood Risk of Speaking Out’
Princess Aisling Duval assumes oversight of the Empire's contributions to Aegis and defends her decision to defy the Emperor's isolationist decree.
3309-01-16
Princess Aisling Echoes Aegis Reformation Calls
Princess Aisling Duval publicly urges Emperor Arissa Lavigny-Duval to join the Alliance and Federation in reforming Aegis to combat the Thargoid threat.
